html:
The Straw Hat is a Hat Item found in the Dress Tab. It costs 12 Cut Grass to craft. It is required to construct the Miner Hat and the Bush Hat. In the base game, it has no functionality when worn.

Downloadable Content

In DLCs the Straw Hat does not require a Science Machine to prototype. It provides small protection from Wetness and 60 points of protection from Overheating, and loses Durability when worn. The Sewing Kit repairs 100% of its durability.

With the Seasonal Starting Items default preset, the Straw Hat will be given to any players joining a world for the first time, during Spring.

The simple combination of using the Straw Hat and the Umbrella is enough to prevent the player from getting wet during rain, being an easy and accessible way out for the Wetness problem as the Straw Hat has a low cost based solely on Cut Grass.

In the Reign of Giants DLC, the Straw Hat is also one of the ingredients required to craft a Rain Hat.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, it is one of the ingredients required to craft the Snakeskin Hat, the Captain Hat and the Dumbrella.

In the Hamlet DLC, Straw Hats can be bought for 3 Oincs at The Sow's Ear Hat Shop in the Pig City.

Usage

×2

×2

Trivia

  • The Straw Hat used to cost 30 Science Points to craft and had a value of 10 Science Points when used on a Science Machine in the research days of Don't Starve.
  • Before the Spoiled Rotten update, the Straw Hat was used to craft the Spiderhat.
  • Despite being made of Cut Grass, this hat is non-flammable.
  • The Straw Hat's description used to be "How fashionable!".

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Wilson wearing a Straw Hat.
  • Willow wearing a Straw Hat.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Straw Hat.
  • Wendy wearing a Straw Hat.

  • Woodie wearing a Straw Hat.

  • Maxwell wearing a Straw Hat.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Straw Hat.
  • Webber wearing a Straw Hat.

  • Wilbur wearing a Straw Hat.

  • Wilba wearing a Straw Hat.
  • Wormwood wearing a Straw Hat.
  • Wheeler wearing a Straw Hat.
  • Winona wearing a Straw Hat.
  • Wortox wearing a Straw Hat.
  • Wurt wearing a Straw Hat.
  • A Bunnyman wearing a Straw Hat.
  • A Pig wearing a Straw Hat.
  • Splumonkeys fighting over a Straw Hat as seen in a drawing from Art Stream # 85.

“I could dress up like a farmer, how fun!”
–Wanda
The Straw Hat is a Hat Item found in the Dress Tab. It costs 12 Cut Grass to craft. It is required to construct the Miner Hat and the Bush Hat. In the base game, it has no functionality when worn.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In DLCs the Straw Hat does not require a Science Machine to prototype. It provides small protection from Wetness and 60 points of protection from Overheating, and loses Durability when worn. The Sewing Kit repairs 100% of its durability.
With the Seasonal Starting Items default preset, the Straw Hat will be given to any players joining a world for the first time, during Spring.
The simple combination of using the Straw Hat and the Umbrella is enough to prevent the player from getting wet during rain, being an easy and accessible way out for the Wetness problem as the Straw Hat has a low cost based solely on Cut Grass.
In the Reign of Giants DLC, the Straw Hat is also one of the ingredients required to craft a Rain Hat.
In the Shipwrecked DLC, it is one of the ingredients required to craft the Snakeskin Hat, the Captain Hat and the Dumbrella.
In the Hamlet DLC, Straw Hats can be bought for 3 Oincs at The Sow's Ear Hat Shop in the Pig City.
Usage[edit | edit source]
×2
×2
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Straw Hat used to cost 30 Science Points to craft and had a value of 10 Science Points when used on a Science Machine in the research days of Don't Starve.
Before the Spoiled Rotten update, the Straw Hat was used to craft the Spiderhat.
Despite being made of Cut Grass, this hat is non-flammable.
The Straw Hat's description used to be "How fashionable!".

The '''Straw Hat''' is a [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] [[Item]] found in the [[Dress Tab]]. It costs 12 [[Cut Grass]] to craft. It is required to construct the [[Miner Hat]] and the [[Bush Hat]]. In the base game, it has no functionality when worn.
__NOTOC__
=={{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content==
In [[DLC]]s the Straw Hat does not require a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. It provides small protection from [[Wetness]] and 60 points of protection from [[Overheating]], and loses [[Durability]] when worn. The [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 100% of its durability.

With the '''Seasonal Starting Items''' default preset, the Straw Hat will be given to any players joining a world for the first time, during [[Spring]].

The simple combination of using the Straw Hat and the [[Umbrella]] is enough to prevent the player from getting wet during rain, being an easy and accessible way out for the Wetness problem as the Straw Hat has a low cost based solely on Cut Grass.

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, the Straw Hat is also one of the ingredients required to craft a [[Rain Hat]].

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, it is one of the ingredients required to craft the [[Snakeskin Hat]], the [[Captain Hat]] and the [[Dumbrella]].

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, Straw Hats can be bought for 3 [[Oinc]]s at [[The Sow's Ear Hat Shop]] in the [[Pig City]].

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Straw Hat used to cost 30 [[science|Science Points]] to craft and had a value of 10 Science Points when used on a Science Machine in the research days of ''Don't Starve''.
* Before the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History#January 15th, 2013 - Spoiled Rotten|Spoiled Rotten]]'' update, the Straw Hat was used to craft the [[Spiderhat]].
* Despite being made of Cut Grass, this hat is non-flammable.
* The Straw Hat's description used to be "''How fashionable!''".
